reviews.review_description: Generally a pretty cool application. the pipetting is sometimes a bit particular, and sometimes the pipet stops working entirely. Otherwise, it appears to be a helpful app for my students to get a feel for lab work. If there is something you can do to fix this issue, I would be happy to change to 5 stars. I'm also not sure how to unlock the rest of the experiments.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback! We're glad to hear that you find our application helpful for your students. We apologize for the inconvenience you've experienced with the pipetting feature. Our development team is actively working on a fix to ensure smoother and more reliable performance.
Regarding unlocking the rest of the experiments, we are currently working on them and they will be available very soon.
We appreciate your patience and understanding. Once these issues are resolved, we will make sure to update you!
